title: AI News Weekly Recap — July 19, 2026
summary: The week's real story wasn't any single release — it was three fronts moving at once: Google's flagship model kept missing its own deadlines while DeepMind bled star researchers to rivals, China's open-weight models leapt into the trillion-parameter class and rattled markets, and Anthropic pushed simultaneously toward a mega-IPO, a Blackstone-backed consulting arm, and a safety hiring spree stocked with nuclear and biothreat experts.
